_comment: Story-points → estimated_hours map. /ai/suggest-estimation returns ONLY story_points, but issues store estimated_hours, so a conversion is required. Every value derived from this table is flagged 'ai-estimated' for human review.
_calibration: Anchored to the 3XA Projekt org's real estimate distribution (428 estimated issues across all projects, 2026-06-07): median 3h, p75 6h, p90 10h, max 80h — i.e. mostly small tasks. The org uses hours directly (0 issues carry story points), so these map AI-suggested points onto that real effort scale. Recalibrate for your org: re-run the analysis or just edit the map below.
